General.Name: Billion Industrial Holdings Limited
General.Description: Billion Industrial Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in manufacturing and sales of polyester filament yarns, polyester, polyester industrial yarns, and ES fiber products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers drawn textured yarns, fully drawn yarns, and partially oriented yarns used in the production of high-end fabrics and textiles for various consumer products, including apparel, footwear, and home furnishings. It also provides special products, such as cotton-like polymer fiber, baiku yarn, bainuan yarn, baiwei super soft fiber, heavy denier low elastic yarn, shaped fiber, ultraviolet resistant polyester, three dimensional super bright yarn, super bright color yarn, u-shaped fiber, fluorescent whitening fiber, bamboo fiber yarn, and black flame resistant fiber. In addition, the company offers industrial polyester yarn; polyester film products comprising metallization base film, printing base film, transfer base film, heat sealable film, twistable film, anti-static film, electrical insulation base film, card lamination base film, hot stamping base film, metallic yarn base film, reflector base film, holographic base film, electronic releasing film, coating film, and solar base film products; and polyester bottle chip. Billion Industrial Holdings Limited was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Office Tower, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
